description: Proof-of-concept historical ownership layered on modern province geometry. Country rules remap modern ISO tags to era tags; province overrides demonstrate cores, claims, controllers, and disputed status without rewriting borders.
label: Demo 1444-style ownership overlay
license_lineage: Natural Earth public domain (geographic scaffold only)
notes: Historical ownership is a curated overlay; province geometry is unchanged.
Assignment precedence: baseline ← country_rules ← region_rules ← province_overrides.
Sea provinces are excluded from ownership tables.
